Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Eagly respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information submitted through our website and product experience.

Information we collect

We collect information you provide directly, such as your email, business name, phone number, and communications with us.

How we use information

We use your information to respond to inquiries, provide product access, improve our services, and send updates about Eagly.

Data sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with service providers who help us operate Eagly.

Security

We use reasonable safeguards to protect your data, including encryption and access controls where appropriate.

Your choices

You can request updates or deletion of your personal data by contacting info@eagly.ai.

Contact

If you have privacy questions, contact us at info@eagly.ai.
